title: Payment type
description: Understanding different payment type such as voluntary agreement, no ABN quoted and specified payments.

content_blocks.text: The amount you show is the total income you received that was subject to a PAYG voluntary agreement, including amounts of tax withheld.
The amount you show is your total income from which an amount has been withheld because you did not quote your ABN, including the amounts of tax withheld.
Labour hire or other specified payments

items: tutorial services you provided for the Indigenous Student Success Programme (formerly known as the Indigenous Tutorial Assistance Scheme) of the Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet
income from translation and interpretation services for the Translating and Interpreting Service National of the Department of Immigration and Border Protection
income as a performing artist in a promotional activity
payments of green army allowance (within the meaning of the Social Security Act 1991) .

content_blocks.text: The amount you show is the total income you received from labour hire or other specified payments, including amounts of tax withheld.

Do not include income received as an employee of a labour hire business. These amounts will appear on your PAYG payment summary – individual non-business and you should show them at Payment summaries in your tax return.

content_text:
## Voluntary agreement
The amount you show is the total income you received that was subject to a PAYG voluntary agreement, including amounts of tax withheld.
## No ABN quoted
The amount you show is your total income from which an amount has been withheld because you did not quote your ABN, including the amounts of tax withheld.
## Labour hire or other specified payments
Specified payments include:
- tutorial services you provided for the Indigenous Student Success Programme (formerly known as the Indigenous Tutorial Assistance Scheme) of the Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet
- income from translation and interpretation services for the Translating and Interpreting Service National of the Department of Immigration and Border Protection
- income as a performing artist in a promotional activity
- payments of green army allowance (within the meaning of the Social Security Act 1991) .
The amount you show is the total income you received from labour hire or other specified payments, including amounts of tax withheld.
Do not include income received as an employee of a labour hire business. These amounts will appear on your PAYG payment summary – individual non-business and you should show them at Payment summaries in your tax return.
